Bash(/tmp/organize_subcategories.py << 'EOF'
import re
import yaml

# Read the YAML file
with open\('/Users/hamada/WorkSpace/IEEE/Back_end/storage/api-docs/api-docs.yaml', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Resource mapping for better naming
resource_map = {
    'auth': 'Authentication',
    'users': 'Users',
    'chapters': 'Chapters',
    'committees': 'Committees',
    'competitions': 'Competitions',
    'events': 'Events',
    'activities': 'Activities',
    'news': 'News',
    'seasons': 'Seasons',
    'summaries': 'Summaries',
    'goals': 'Goals',
    'tracks': 'Tracks',
    'positions': 'Positions',
    'roles': 'Roles',
    'permissions': 'Permissions',
    'descriptions': 'Descriptions',
    'login': 'Authentication',
    'logout': 'Authentication',
    'register': 'Authentication',
    'verify-registration': 'Authentication',
    'reset-password': 'Authentication',
    'send-password-reset-code': 'Authentication',
}

def get_tag_for_path\(path\):
    """Determine the appropriate tag based on the path"""
    # Remove leading slash and split path
    parts = path.strip\(\).split\('/'\)
    
    # Determine section \(dashboard, site, eventsgate\)
    section = None
    resource = None
    
    if 'dashboard' in parts:
        section = 'Dashboard'
        idx = parts.index\('dashboard'\)
        if len\(parts\) > idx + 1:
            resource = parts[idx + 1]
    elif 'site' in parts:
        section = 'Site'
        idx = parts.index\('site'\)
        if len\(parts\) > idx + 1:
            resource = parts[idx + 1]
    elif 'eventsgate' in parts:
        section = 'EventsGate'
        idx = parts.index\('eventsgate'\)
        if len\(parts\) > idx + 1:
            resource = parts[idx + 1]
    
    # Get proper resource name
    if resource and resource in resource_map:
        resource_name = resource_map[resource]
        return f"{section} - {resource_name}"
    elif resource:
        # Capitalize first letter
        resource_name = resource.capitalize\(\)
        return f"{section} - {resource_name}"
    else:
        return section

# Find and update tags for each path
def replace_path_tags\(match\):
    path = match.group\(1\)
    tag = get_tag_for_path\(path\)
    return f"{match.group\(0\).split\('tags:'\)[0]}tags:\\n        - {tag}"

# Pattern to match path and its tags section
pattern = r'\(  /[^\\n]+:\)\\n    \(?:get|post|put|patch|delete\):\\n      summary: [^\\n]+\\n      responses: \\{\\}\\n      tags:\\n        - \(?:Dashboard|Site|EventsGate\)'

content = re.sub\(pattern, replace_path_tags, content\)

# Write back
with open\('/Users/hamada/WorkSpace/IEEE/Back_end/storage/api-docs/api-docs.yaml', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)

print\("Routes organized with subcategories!"\)
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/fix_slug_parameters.py << 'EOF'
import re

# Read the YAML file
with open\('/Users/hamada/WorkSpace/IEEE/Back_end/storage/api-docs/api-docs.yaml', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Split into lines for processing
lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
new_lines = []
seen_routes = set\(\)

for line in lines:
    # Pattern 1: /api/.../events/{slug-like-string}
    # Replace hardcoded event slugs
    if re.match\(r'^  /api/.*/events/[a-z0-9-]+:', line\):
        base = re.sub\(r'/events/[a-z0-9-]+:', '/events/{event}:', line\)
        if base not in seen_routes:
            new_lines.append\(base\)
            seen_routes.add\(base\)
        continue
    
    # Pattern 2: /api/.../events/{slug}/images \(and other sub-resources\)
    if re.match\(r'^  /api/.*/events/[a-z0-9-]+/\(images|participants|speakers|sponsors\)', line\):
        base = re.sub\(r'/events/[a-z0-9-]+/', '/events/{event}/', line\)
        if base not in seen_routes:
            new_lines.append\(base\)
            seen_routes.add\(base\)
        continue
    
    # Pattern 3: /api/.../competitions/{slug-like-string}
    if re.match\(r'^  /api/.*/competitions/[a-z0-9-]+:', line\):
        base = re.sub\(r'/competitions/[a-z0-9-]+:', '/competitions/{competition}:', line\)
        if base not in seen_routes:
            new_lines.append\(base\)
            seen_routes.add\(base\)
        continue
    
    # Pattern 4: /api/.../chapters/{slug-like-string}
    if re.match\(r'^  /api/.*/chapters/[a-z0-9-]+:', line\):
        base = re.sub\(r'/chapters/[a-z0-9-]+:', '/chapters/{chapter}:', line\)
        if base not in seen_routes:
            new_lines.append\(base\)
            seen_routes.add\(base\)
        continue
    
    new_lines.append\(line\)

content = '\\n'.join\(new_lines\)

# Write back
with open\('/Users/hamada/WorkSpace/IEEE/Back_end/storage/api-docs/api-docs.yaml', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)

print\("Slug parameters fixed!"\)
EOF)
